page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B cores operating at 2.9 GHz, with 1.0 thread per core. The system is equipped with 752.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 5.88 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the instance includes four NVIDIA A10 GPUs from the Ampere family, delivering a combined 96 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, requiring external storage attachments.

In benchmark testing, the instance exhibits top-tier multi-core capabilities, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 123935.69 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 575.13 GB/sec, both placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Memory bandwidth is also highly competitive, reaching 6856.96 GB/sec for cached small-block reads (top 10%) and 253.9 GB/sec for large-block reads (top 25%). However, single-core performance is more moderate, with stress-ng single-core and single-threaded gzip compression scores falling in the middle 50% average tier.

The qualitative cost profile of this instance reflects its high resource density, combining massive parallel CPU compute with quad-GPU acceleration. The primary tradeoff is the complete absence of local storage, which necessitates network-attached storage and may impact I/O-heavy operations. With a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps, the instance is structured for distributed workloads. It is suitable for multi-threaded processing, GPU-accelerated machine learning workloads, parallel data decompression, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.32xlarge is a high-density, GPU-accelerated server instance built on the x86_64 architecture using the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B cores running at 2.9 GHz, 752.0 GB of RAM, and four NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPUs providing 96 GB of total VRAM. While the instance lacks local storage, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates top-tier multi-core CPU performance and cached memory bandwidth, though single-core performance remains average. This hardware composition is optimized for highly parallelized workloads, including GPU-accelerated compute, multi-threaded data processing, and high-throughput network applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.32xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 752 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA A10 GPUs with 96 GB VRAM, designed for highly parallel workloads.

tagline: A dedicated multi-core processor platform featuring quad-GPU acceleration and high memory bandwidth for parallelized computing tasks.

Four NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM
